review_log.note: Inline completeness review passed: Intent is explicit, all 7 findings have concrete affected components and testable success criteria, and the issue doc has no placeholders. Reviewer subagents were not used in this session.

Inline cross-reference review passed: the phased plan covers all 7 findings, includes file-level implementation/testing work, and contains no placeholder language. Reviewer subagents were not used in this session.

Phase 1 approved after splitting `install.sh` into a platform dispatcher plus extracted `scripts/linux-guest-install.sh`, adding Darwin dispatch and Linux-helper entrypoint tests, and rerunning `python3 -m unittest tests.test_install_sh -v` plus the full `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' -v` suite successfully (21 tests OK).

Phase 2 approved after adding `scripts/macos-vm-env.sh`, `scripts/macos-vm-bootstrap.sh`, Ubuntu autoinstall templates, VirtualBox prerequisite gating, deterministic VM configuration, checkpoint state, SSH wait/retry, OpenClaw bootstrap inside the Linux guest, and guest re-entry via `SMARTHUB_GUEST_INSTALL=1 bash install.sh`. Verification passed with `python3 -m unittest tests.test_install_sh -v` (13 tests OK) and `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' -v` (26 tests OK).

Phase 3 approved after rewriting `README.md`, `tools/setup.md`, `tools/_errors.md`, `tools/_common.md`, `tools/integrations/_guide.md`, and `CLAUDE.md` around the VM-only macOS support contract; adding `tests/test_macos_vm_docs.py`; and extending integration doc coverage for host-vs-guest boundaries. Verification passed with `python3 -m unittest tests.test_setup_docs tests.test_integrations_docs tests.test_macos_vm_docs -v` (5 tests OK) and `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' -v` (28 tests OK).

discoveries.description: The first guest-handoff implementation assumed OpenClaw already existed inside the Linux guest, which broke the promised one-command macOS bootstrap on a fresh VM.
discoveries.resolution: Bootstrap OpenClaw and a default `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` inside the Linux guest before rerunning `SMARTHUB_GUEST_INSTALL=1 bash install.sh`.
